title: dacryodes robusta
intro: Dacryodes robusta, also known as the Canarium or Black Cumin, is a tropical tree native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Burseraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dacryodes robusta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the seeds or oil of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, and can be extracted and consumed as a supplement or used in cooking.
